seo.title: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co | Top-Rated Plumber in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co offers expert plumbing services in Dallas, TX. From emergency repairs to water heater installation, our licensed plumbers deliver fast, reliable service. Call (972) 243-8051 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Dallas’s Most Trusted Plumbing & Heating Company
hero.subheadline: Fast, professional plumbing repairs, installations, and maintenance – backed by decades of experience and a commitment to quality.

featureSections.title: Plumbing Emergencies? We’re Here Fast.
featureSections.body: A burst pipe or overflowing toilet can’t wait. Our team responds quickly to minimize damage and restore your peace of mind. We carry parts on our trucks to get the job done right the first time.
featureSections.cardBody: We work around your timeline, arriving within the window we promise.

featureSections.title: Reliable Water Heater Installation & Repair
featureSections.body: Whether you need a traditional tank or a modern tankless system, our licensed technicians handle installation, maintenance, and emergency repairs. We help you choose the most efficient option for your home.
featureSections.cardBody: Upgrade to an energy-efficient model and save up to 30% on water heating costs.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Our team is fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection. We meet all Texas state requirements.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You’ll know the cost before any work begins. No surprises, no upsells – just honest, transparent rates.

whyChooseUs.title: 45+ Years of Experience
whyChooseUs.description: Since 1979, we’ve built a reputation for quality workmanship and reliable service across Dallas.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind every job. If you’re not happy, we’ll make it right – no questions asked.

testimonials.quote: Atlas Plumbing saved us on a Sunday! They arrived within an hour and fixed the leak quickly. Fair price and friendly service.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: We’ve used Atlas for years – they installed our water heater and fixed a slab leak. Always professional and on time.
testimonials.author: Linda T.

testimonials.quote: Best plumber in Dallas. They diagnosed a tricky sewer issue that two other companies missed. Honest and affordable.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready to Solve Your Plumbing Problem?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online – we’ll have a pro at your door fast.

servicesPage.intro: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co offers a full range of plumbing services for Dallas homes and businesses. From minor repairs to major installations, our licensed technicians deliver quality workmanship and exceptional customer care.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency plumbing service for burst pipes, overflowing toilets, and more.
services.longDescription: Plumbing emergencies don’t follow a 9-to-5 schedule. That’s why Atlas Plumbing offers around-the-clock emergency repair services. Our experienced technicians arrive quickly with fully stocked trucks to diagnose and fix the problem – often the same day. We prioritize minimizing damage and restoring function, all with transparent pricing and a satisfaction guarantee.
benefits: Fast response – we’re on our way within 60 minutes
Licensed technicians with years of emergency experience
Upfront pricing with no overtime fees
We handle everything from leaks to sewer backups

process.title: 1. Call or Book Online
process.description: Contact us anytime – our dispatcher will ask a few questions and send the nearest tech.

process.title: 2. Diagnose & Quote
process.description: We inspect the issue, explain the solution, and provide a fixed price before starting work.

process.title: 3. Repair & Clean Up
process.description: We fix the problem efficiently, test everything, and leave your home clean.

faqs.question: How quickly can you get here?
faqs.answer: We aim to arrive within one hour for emergency calls within Dallas city limits.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for after-hours service?
faqs.answer: No. Our emergency rates are the same as our standard rates – no hidden fees.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert installation and repair of tank and tankless water heaters.
services.longDescription: A reliable water heater is essential for comfort. Atlas Plumbing installs, repairs, and maintains all major brands of tank and tankless water heaters. We help you select the right size and energy-efficient model to meet your household’s needs, and our work is backed by a warranty for your peace of mind.
benefits: Free consultation on the best water heater for your home
Repairs for all makes and models – often same-day

process.title: 1. Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current system, water usage, and energy goals to recommend the ideal unit.

process.title: 2. Installation
process.description: Our team installs the new water heater safely and efficiently, ensuring all codes are met.

process.title: 3. Testing & Walkthrough
process.description: We test the system, show you how to use it, and answer any questions.

faqs.question: Should I choose a tank or tankless water heater?
faqs.answer: Tankless heaters save energy and space but have higher upfront costs. We’ll help you compare based on your home’s needs.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in 2–4 hours, depending on the system and complexity.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Sewer Services
services.shortDescription: Professional drain cleaning and sewer line repair using advanced equipment.
services.longDescription: Clogged drains and sewer line issues can cause major headaches. Atlas Plumbing uses video camera inspections and hydro-jetting to diagnose and clear blockages effectively. Whether it’s a slow kitchen sink or a tree root intrusion in your main sewer line, we provide lasting solutions.
benefits: Camera inspection to pinpoint the problem
Hydro-jetting removes grease, roots, and debris
Preventive maintenance plans to avoid future clogs

process.title: 1. Video Inspection
process.description: We insert a camera to locate the blockage and assess pipe condition.

process.title: 2. Cleaning or Repair
process.description: We use hydro-jetting or mechanical snaking to clear the line, or recommend repair if needed.

process.title: 3. Final Check
process.description: We re-inspect to confirm the line is clear and functional.

faqs.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend annual cleaning for most homes to prevent buildup and emergencies.

faqs.question: Do you repair sewer lines without digging?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer trenchless repair methods that minimize yard disruption.

services.title: Fixture Installation & Repiping
services.shortDescription: Installation and repair of faucets, toilets, sinks, and full repiping.
services.longDescription: Upgrade your home with new fixtures or repipe aging pipes to prevent leaks and improve water pressure. Atlas Plumbing handles everything from a single faucet installation to whole-home repiping. We use high-quality materials and ensure every connection is secure and code-compliant.
benefits: Wide selection of faucets, toilets, and sinks
Repiping solutions for old or corroded pipes
Water pressure improvement and leak prevention

process.title: 1. Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, measure spaces, and recommend fixtures or pipe materials.

process.title: 2. Installation
process.description: Our team removes old fixtures or pipes and installs the new ones with precision.

process.title: 3. Quality Check
process.description: We test all connections for leaks and ensure proper operation.

faqs.question: Can you match my existing fixture style?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can install fixtures that complement your current design or help you choose new ones.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need repiping?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent leaks, low water pressure, discolored water, or pipes over 50 years old. We offer a free inspection.

about.headline: Dallas’s Trusted Plumbing Experts Since 1979
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners and businesses with reliable, honest plumbing services that exceed expectations – every time.
story: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co was founded in 1979 with a simple mission: deliver quality plumbing work with integrity. What started as a small family operation has grown into one of Dallas’s most trusted plumbing companies, serving thousands of customers across the metroplex. Our longevity is built on consistent craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and a commitment to doing the job right.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of licensed, experienced plumbers who treat every home like their own. We invest in the latest tools and training to provide efficient solutions, from emergency repairs to full system installations. As a local, family-owned business, we’re proud to be part of the Dallas community and to earn your trust one job at a time.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest advice and fair prices – no pressure, no shortcuts.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and keep you informed every step of the way.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we support our neighbors and give back to Dallas.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Atlas Plumbing
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call or fill out the form below – we’ll respond quickly.
